name: Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
From Western New York Apple Growers Association
1. Spray a 13x9x2" baking pan with non-stick coating and set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl combine sugars, oil, and egg whites. Beat with a wooden spoon until well blended.
3. Add flours, oat bran, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg; stir until just moistened.
4. Stir in shredded apples. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 25-30 minutes.
6. Cool, if desired, sift powdered sugar over cake.
